summary: Iteration 34 - Information Sheet Feature Testing Complete. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working. The REWRITTEN Information Sheet with 6 sections, editable fields, collapsible sections, and save functionality is fully operational.
critical_code_review_comments: INFO_SHEET_SCHEMA correctly defines 6 sections with proper field types (text, date, select, textarea)
Route /api/cases/info-sheet-schema correctly placed BEFORE /{case_id} to avoid route conflict
InfoSheetEditor component properly fetches schema on mount and loads existing data
Repeatable sections (Dependent Children, Migrating Dependents, Qualifications, Employment) use entry_prefix pattern for flat storage
Save functionality correctly updates MongoDB with change_history tracking
Required fields properly marked with red asterisks in UI
seed_data_creation: Test data created during backend tests (given_names, family_name, qualifications, employment)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 34 tested the REWRITTEN Information Sheet feature. ALL PASSED: (1) GET /api/cases/info-sheet-schema - Returns complete schema with 6 sections: Personal Details (21 fields), Family Chart (12 fields), Dependent Children (repeatable x4), Migrating Dependents (repeatable x5), Qualifications (repeatable x4), Employment History (repeatable x4), (2) GET /api/cases/{case_id}/information-sheet - Returns existing data with completion percentage, (3) POST /api/cases/{case_id}/information-sheet - Saves form data to MongoDB with change_history tracking, (4) Data persistence verified - saved data persists after page reload, (5) Frontend InfoSheetEditor component - Shows 'Required Information Sheet' header with 'Upload Resume & Auto-Fill' and 'Save All Changes' buttons, (6) Personal Details section expanded by default with 21 editable fields, (7) All 6 collapsible sections visible and toggleable, (8) Fields are EDITABLE - text inputs work, date pickers work, dropdowns work, (9) Required fields marked with red asterisks, (10) Repeatable sections have 'Add' buttons and show entry numbers (#1, #2, etc.), (11) Sticky save button appears when form is dirty. Client case_id: cb09cf65-9a0c-47c6-8585-bace5da8c221.

backend_apis.repeatable_sections_entry_fields: PASS - Repeatable sections have entry_fields, max_entries, entry_prefix
backend_apis.field_types_valid: PASS - All fields have valid types (text, date, select, textarea)
backend_apis.get_information_sheet: PASS - Returns data with exists, data, completion fields
backend_apis.save_and_verify_persistence: PASS - Saved data persists after GET
backend_apis.save_repeatable_section_data: PASS - Qualifications and Employment data saves and persists

frontend_client_dashboard.6_collapsible_sections: PASS - All 6 sections visible with correct titles and badges
frontend_client_dashboard.required_field_markers: PASS - 15+ red asterisks found for required fields
frontend_client_dashboard.save_functionality: PASS - Save button works, success toast appears
frontend_client_dashboard.data_persistence_after_reload: PASS - Data persists after page reload
frontend_client_dashboard.repeatable_section_add_button: PASS - 'Add Qualification' button found and clickable
frontend_client_dashboard.sticky_save_button: PASS - Appears when form is dirty
